title: narcissus juncifolius subsp. gaditanus
intro: Narcissus juncifolius subsp. gaditanus, also known as the Canary Island Daffodil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Narcissus juncifolius subsp. gaditanus are thought to include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
